title: Notifications
subtitle: Review task, quota, team, and system updates in one place
adminSubtitle: Handle monitoring alerts, platform quota, and operational events
emptyHint: Task results, quota reminders, and system updates will appear here

failed.title: Export failed

failed.title: AI optimization failed
failed.message: AI optimization for “{{resource_title}}” failed. Open the task details.

warning.title: Quota is running low

exceeded.title: Quota exhausted
exceeded.message: {{organization_name}} has reached or exceeded its {{metric}} limit.
